title: Rebirth call-to-action (Apr 1 2024)
html:
TL;DR

  • Tiny one-paragraph manifesto Yahir writes to himself on Apr 1 2024, four weeks before the Sam breakup script. Pure call-to-action: "Rebirth. I am going to transform into a new manifested person through my actions. Enough bullshitting."
  • Frames belief in self as a logical entitlement, not a feeling: "those who truly go after it are deserving because it makes logical sense, no matter what bullshit gets thrown, you deflect, embrace, and prevail."
  • Self-addresses by full name — "You are Yahir Gonzalez" — a rhetorical move he reuses across the high-self-talk corpus (compare Aug 2025 Emily letter "I know I am great. I know I am elite.").
  • Acknowledges continuity beneath the rebirth: "a lot of aspects of you are going to remain the same, but an enhancement is necessary." Not a clean-break manifesto — a layering one.
  • Sits on the timeline as a hinge between the late-March 2024 thoughts-and-things and the Sam-breakup spring, marking the moment-of-resolve before the actual rupture.

Privacy

  • Single sentence, single name (his own). No PII concerns.

Relations

  • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script — the rupture this rebirth precedes
  • 2025 08 14 Emily — same self-talk grammar, 16 months later
  • 2025 11 24 Get a Grip — 19-months-later companion: "Are we doing this or not"
  • burn bright die young — adjacent intensity-as-virtue concept
  • yahir family

related.label: Emily — letter to self, asymmetry + elite self-talk (Aug 14 2025)
Sam — the breakup confrontation script (Jaden lie, trust shattered)
